arts.ttl: Man City injury news as Erling Haaland doubt overshadows two players passed fit
arts.sum: Manchester City have two players back available for the visit of Brentford but will be without a pair of others and potentially a third individual in Erling Haaland

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Marco Silva's side, who lost Joao Palhinha to Bayern Munich over the summer, started the campaign with a late 1-0 defeat at Manchester United before winning their home opener against Leicester 2-1. West Ham will be hoping to enjoy a less humiliating visit to Craven Cottage as they take on Fulham in the Premier League this weekend.

arts.ttl: Inside Man City's trial of the century: What's at stake, what they are accused of and what it could mean for the future of our game
arts.sum: In an anonymous conference room at an undisclosed location, the most significant legal case football has ever known is about to get under way, with Manchester City's credibility at stake.

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Man City eye Xavi Simons to replace Kevin De Bruyne
arts.sum: Man City join Liverpool and Bayern Munich in the race to sign Leipzig's Xavi Simons. Transfer Talk has the latest.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Man City v Brentford
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs for Man City v Brentford The post FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Man City v Brentford appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends message to Man City's rivals hoping to see Premier League punishment
arts.sum: Man City's hearing into charges of alleged financial doping starts on Monday, with boss Pep Guardiola claiming the rest of the Premier League rivals want to see them punished.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola claims EVERY Premier League team wants Man City to lose their battle against 115 alleged rule breaches... as the Spaniard insists his club are innocent 'until guilt is proven'
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: The City boss said his players had not discussed the case, which relates to alleged breaches of top-flight financial rules between 2009 and 2018.

arts.ttl: 'I agree with Tebas' - Pep Guardiola blasts Man City rivals over Premier League charges
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was asked about comments made by La Liga chief Javier Tebas about their Premier League charges

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola 'happy' for start of Man City's 115 charges hearing
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola reveals he is "happy" for the hearing into the 115 charges against the club for alleged breaches of Financial Fair Play rules

arts.ttl: Why Pep Guardiola 'Watches' Liverpool More Now Than When Under Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Guardiola has a new rival in Arne Slot and he is having to learn all about his tactics
